{{nihongo|'''Kataoka Shrine'''|片岡神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

torii.jpg {{commons category|Category:Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} [[JA:片岡神社 (王寺町)]] {{wikidata link|Q43594918}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2017-12}} {{神社 |名称= 片岡神社 |画像= [[ファイル:Kataoka-jinja (Oji), haiden.jpg|280px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=280}} |所在地= {{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|北葛城郡|Q1131013}}{{jalink|王寺町|Q1346392}}{{jalink|本町 (王寺町)|Q11520694|本町}}二丁目6-1 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 35 | 緯度秒 = 22.6 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 42 | 経度秒 = 17.7 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= {{jalink|天照大神|Q455602|天照皇太神}}
{{jalink|住吉三神|Q1114013|表筒男命・中筒男命・底筒男命}}
{{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997|品陀別命}}
清瀧命 |社格= {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大}}）
旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建= 不詳 |本殿= {{jalink|神明造|Q930545}} |例祭= {{jalink|7月31日|Q2715}}（夏祭）
{{jalink|10月25日|Q2954}}（秋祭） |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''片岡神社'''（かたおかじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|北葛城郡|Q1131013}}{{jalink|王寺町|Q1346392}}{{jalink|本町 (王寺町)|Q11520694|本町}}二丁目にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}）で{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|近代社格制度#諸社|Q712534|郷社}}。 === 歴史 === === 概史 === 太古は{{jalink|王寺町|Q1346392}}本町の小字大峯に鎮座したと伝える。{{jalink|大同 (日本)|Q1373191|大同}}元年（{{jalink|806年|Q30021}}）大和に七戸、遠江に八戸、近江二十五戸の{{jalink|神封|Q1689534}}を当てられ（{{jalink|新抄格勅符抄|Q11502312}}）、{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}には{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}に列格し、祈雨神祭にも預かった名社であった。 {{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}6年（{{jalink|1873年|Q7757}}）4月、{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}に列せられた。 === 神階 === *{{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下勲八等から正五位上勲八等（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』） === 交通アクセス === * {{jalink|西日本旅客鉄道|Q502125|JR西日本}}{{jalink|大和路線|Q1151659}}・{{jalink|和歌山線|Q511543}}{{jalink|王寺駅|Q856582}}から徒歩15分 === 外部リンク === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - 王寺町 文化財マップ * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - 2010年の奈良の実景 (奈良県立図書情報館) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - 鹿嶋神社 (香芝市鎮座) {{DEFAULTSORT:かたおかしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:王寺町の建築物]] [[Category:王寺町の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|名かたおかしんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧郷社]]

{{jalink|10月25日|Q2954}}（秋祭） |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''片岡神社'''（かたおかじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|北葛城郡|Q1131013}}{{jalink|王寺町|Q1346392}}{{jalink|本町 (王寺町)|Q11520694|本町}}二丁目にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}）で{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|近代社格制度#諸社|Q712534|郷社}}。 === 歴史 === === 概史 === 太古は{{jalink|王寺町|Q1346392}}本町の小字大峯に鎮座したと伝える。{{jalink|大同 (日本)|Q1373191|大同}}元年（{{jalink|806年|Q30021}}）大和に七戸、遠江に八戸、近江二十五戸の{{jalink|神封|Q1689534}}を当てられ（{{jalink|新抄格勅符抄|Q11502312}}）、{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}には{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}に列格し、祈雨神祭にも預かった名社であった。 {{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}6年（{{jalink|1873年|Q7757}}）4月、{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}に列せられた。 === 神階 === *{{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下勲八等から正五位上勲八等（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』） === 交通アクセス === * {{jalink|西日本旅客鉄道|Q502125|JR西日本}}{{jalink|大和路線|Q1151659}}・{{jalink|和歌山線|Q511543}}{{jalink|王寺駅|Q856582}}から徒歩15分 === 外部リンク === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - 王寺町 文化財マップ * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - 2010年の奈良の実景 (奈良県立図書情報館) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - 鹿嶋神社 (香芝市鎮座) {{DEFAULTSORT:かたおかしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:王寺町の建築物]] [[Category:王寺町の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|名かたおかしんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧郷社]] [[Category:pages]]

拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=280}} |所在地= {{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|北葛城郡|Q1131013}}{{jalink|王寺町|Q1346392}}{{jalink|本町 (王寺町)|Q11520694|本町}}二丁目6-1 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 35 | 緯度秒 = 22.6 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 42 | 経度秒 = 17.7 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= {{jalink|天照大神|Q455602|天照皇太神}}
{{jalink|住吉三神|Q1114013|表筒男命・中筒男命・底筒男命}}
{{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997|品陀別命}}
清瀧命 |社格= {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大}}）
旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建= 不詳 |本殿= {{jalink|神明造|Q930545}} |例祭= {{jalink|7月31日|Q2715}}（夏祭）
{{jalink|10月25日|Q2954}}（秋祭） |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''片岡神社'''（かたおかじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|北葛城郡|Q1131013}}{{jalink|王寺町|Q1346392}}{{jalink|本町 (王寺町)|Q11520694|本町}}二丁目にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}）で{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|近代社格制度#諸社|Q712534|郷社}}。 === 歴史 === === 概史 === 太古は{{jalink|王寺町|Q1346392}}本町の小字大峯に鎮座したと伝える。{{jalink|大同 (日本)|Q1373191|大同}}元年（{{jalink|806年|Q30021}}）大和に七戸、遠江に八戸、近江二十五戸の{{jalink|神封|Q1689534}}を当てられ（{{jalink|新抄格勅符抄|Q11502312}}）、{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}には{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}に列格し、祈雨神祭にも預かった名社であった。 {{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}6年（{{jalink|1873年|Q7757}}）4月、{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}に列せられた。 === 神階 === *{{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下勲八等から正五位上勲八等（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』） === 交通アクセス === * {{jalink|西日本旅客鉄道|Q502125|JR西日本}}{{jalink|大和路線|Q1151659}}・{{jalink|和歌山線|Q511543}}{{jalink|王寺駅|Q856582}}から徒歩15分 === 外部リンク === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - 王寺町 文化財マップ * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - 2010年の奈良の実景 (奈良県立図書情報館) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - 鹿嶋神社 (香芝市鎮座) {{DEFAULTSORT:かたおかしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:王寺町の建築物]] [[Category:王寺町の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|名かたおかしんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧郷社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

torii.jpg {{commons category|Category:Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} [[JA:片岡神社 (王寺町)]] {{wikidata link|Q43594918}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2017-12}} {{神社 |名称= 片岡神社 |画像= [[ファイル:Kataoka-jinja (Oji), haiden.jpg|280px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=280}} |所在地= {{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|北葛城郡|Q1131013}}{{jalink|王寺町|Q1346392}}{{jalink|本町 (王寺町)|Q11520694|本町}}二丁目6-1 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 35 | 緯度秒 = 22.6 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 42 | 経度秒 = 17.7 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= {{jalink|天照大神|Q455602|天照皇太神}}
{{jalink|住吉三神|Q1114013|表筒男命・中筒男命・底筒男命}}
{{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997|品陀別命}}
清瀧命 |社格= {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大}}）
旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建= 不詳 |本殿= {{jalink|神明造|Q930545}} |例祭= {{jalink|7月31日|Q2715}}（夏祭）
{{jalink|10月25日|Q2954}}（秋祭） |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''片岡神社'''（かたおかじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|北葛城郡|Q1131013}}{{jalink|王寺町|Q1346392}}{{jalink|本町 (王寺町)|Q11520694|本町}}二丁目にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}）で{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|近代社格制度#諸社|Q712534|郷社}}。 === 歴史 === === 概史 === 太古は{{jalink|王寺町|Q1346392}}本町の小字大峯に鎮座したと伝える。{{jalink|大同 (日本)|Q1373191|大同}}元年（{{jalink|806年|Q30021}}）大和に七戸、遠江に八戸、近江二十五戸の{{jalink|神封|Q1689534}}を当てられ（{{jalink|新抄格勅符抄|Q11502312}}）、{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}には{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}に列格し、祈雨神祭にも預かった名社であった。 {{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}6年（{{jalink|1873年|Q7757}}）4月、{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}に列せられた。 === 神階 === *{{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下勲八等から正五位上勲八等（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』） === 交通アクセス === * {{jalink|西日本旅客鉄道|Q502125|JR西日本}}{{jalink|大和路線|Q1151659}}・{{jalink|和歌山線|Q511543}}{{jalink|王寺駅|Q856582}}から徒歩15分 === 外部リンク === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - 王寺町 文化財マップ * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - 2010年の奈良の実景 (奈良県立図書情報館) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - 鹿嶋神社 (香芝市鎮座) {{DEFAULTSORT:かたおかしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:王寺町の建築物]] [[Category:王寺町の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|名かたおかしんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧郷社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

torii.jpg {{commons category|Category:Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} [[JA:片岡神社 (王寺町)]] {{wikidata link|Q43594918}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2017-12}} {{神社 |名称= 片岡神社 |画像= [[ファイル:Kataoka-jinja (Oji), haiden.jpg|280px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=280}} |所在地= {{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|北葛城郡|Q1131013}}{{jalink|王寺町|Q1346392}}{{jalink|本町 (王寺町)|Q11520694|本町}}二丁目6-1 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 35 | 緯度秒 = 22.6 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 42 | 経度秒 = 17.7 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= {{jalink|天照大神|Q455602|天照皇太神}}
{{jalink|住吉三神|Q1114013|表筒男命・中筒男命・底筒男命}}
{{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997|品陀別命}}
清瀧命 |社格= {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大}}）
旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建= 不詳 |本殿= {{jalink|神明造|Q930545}} |例祭= {{jalink|7月31日|Q2715}}（夏祭）
{{jalink|10月25日|Q2954}}（秋祭） |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''片岡神社'''（かたおかじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|北葛城郡|Q1131013}}{{jalink|王寺町|Q1346392}}{{jalink|本町 (王寺町)|Q11520694|本町}}二丁目にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}）で{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|近代社格制度#諸社|Q712534|郷社}}。 === 歴史 === === 概史 === 太古は{{jalink|王寺町|Q1346392}}本町の小字大峯に鎮座したと伝える。{{jalink|大同 (日本)|Q1373191|大同}}元年（{{jalink|806年|Q30021}}）大和に七戸、遠江に八戸、近江二十五戸の{{jalink|神封|Q1689534}}を当てられ（{{jalink|新抄格勅符抄|Q11502312}}）、{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}には{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}に列格し、祈雨神祭にも預かった名社であった。 {{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}6年（{{jalink|1873年|Q7757}}）4月、{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}に列せられた。 === 神階 === *{{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下勲八等から正五位上勲八等（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』） === 交通アクセス === * {{jalink|西日本旅客鉄道|Q502125|JR西日本}}{{jalink|大和路線|Q1151659}}・{{jalink|和歌山線|Q511543}}{{jalink|王寺駅|Q856582}}から徒歩15分 === 外部リンク === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - 王寺町 文化財マップ * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - 2010年の奈良の実景 (奈良県立図書情報館) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - 鹿嶋神社 (香芝市鎮座) {{DEFAULTSORT:かたおかしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:王寺町の建築物]] [[Category:王寺町の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|名かたおかしんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧郷社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

torii.jpg {{commons category|Category:Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} [[JA:片岡神社 (王寺町)]] {{wikidata link|Q43594918}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2017-12}} {{神社 |名称= 片岡神社 |画像= [[ファイル:Kataoka-jinja (Oji), haiden.jpg|280px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=280}} |所在地= {{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|北葛城郡|Q1131013}}{{jalink|王寺町|Q1346392}}{{jalink|本町 (王寺町)|Q11520694|本町}}二丁目6-1 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 35 | 緯度秒 = 22.6 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 42 | 経度秒 = 17.7 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= {{jalink|天照大神|Q455602|天照皇太神}}
{{jalink|住吉三神|Q1114013|表筒男命・中筒男命・底筒男命}}
{{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997|品陀別命}}
清瀧命 |社格= {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大}}）
旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建= 不詳 |本殿= {{jalink|神明造|Q930545}} |例祭= {{jalink|7月31日|Q2715}}（夏祭）
{{jalink|10月25日|Q2954}}（秋祭） |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''片岡神社'''（かたおかじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|北葛城郡|Q1131013}}{{jalink|王寺町|Q1346392}}{{jalink|本町 (王寺町)|Q11520694|本町}}二丁目にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}）で{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|近代社格制度#諸社|Q712534|郷社}}。 === 歴史 === === 概史 === 太古は{{jalink|王寺町|Q1346392}}本町の小字大峯に鎮座したと伝える。{{jalink|大同 (日本)|Q1373191|大同}}元年（{{jalink|806年|Q30021}}）大和に七戸、遠江に八戸、近江二十五戸の{{jalink|神封|Q1689534}}を当てられ（{{jalink|新抄格勅符抄|Q11502312}}）、{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}には{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}に列格し、祈雨神祭にも預かった名社であった。 {{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}6年（{{jalink|1873年|Q7757}}）4月、{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}に列せられた。 === 神階 === *{{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下勲八等から正五位上勲八等（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』） === 交通アクセス === * {{jalink|西日本旅客鉄道|Q502125|JR西日本}}{{jalink|大和路線|Q1151659}}・{{jalink|和歌山線|Q511543}}{{jalink|王寺駅|Q856582}}から徒歩15分 === 外部リンク === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - 王寺町 文化財マップ * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - 2010年の奈良の実景 (奈良県立図書情報館) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - 鹿嶋神社 (香芝市鎮座) {{DEFAULTSORT:かたおかしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:王寺町の建築物]] [[Category:王寺町の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|名かたおかしんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧郷社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建= 不詳 |本殿= {{jalink|神明造|Q930545}} |例祭= {{jalink|7月31日|Q2715}}（夏祭）
{{jalink|10月25日|Q2954}}（秋祭） |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''片岡神社'''（かたおかじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|北葛城郡|Q1131013}}{{jalink|王寺町|Q1346392}}{{jalink|本町 (王寺町)|Q11520694|本町}}二丁目にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}）で{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|近代社格制度#諸社|Q712534|郷社}}。 === 歴史 === === 概史 === 太古は{{jalink|王寺町|Q1346392}}本町の小字大峯に鎮座したと伝える。{{jalink|大同 (日本)|Q1373191|大同}}元年（{{jalink|806年|Q30021}}）大和に七戸、遠江に八戸、近江二十五戸の{{jalink|神封|Q1689534}}を当てられ（{{jalink|新抄格勅符抄|Q11502312}}）、{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}には{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}に列格し、祈雨神祭にも預かった名社であった。 {{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}6年（{{jalink|1873年|Q7757}}）4月、{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}に列せられた。 === 神階 === *{{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下勲八等から正五位上勲八等（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』） === 交通アクセス === * {{jalink|西日本旅客鉄道|Q502125|JR西日本}}{{jalink|大和路線|Q1151659}}・{{jalink|和歌山線|Q511543}}{{jalink|王寺駅|Q856582}}から徒歩15分 === 外部リンク === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - 王寺町 文化財マップ * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - 2010年の奈良の実景 (奈良県立図書情報館) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - 鹿嶋神社 (香芝市鎮座) {{DEFAULTSORT:かたおかしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:王寺町の建築物]] [[Category:王寺町の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|名かたおかしんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧郷社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

Haiden
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=280}} |所在地= {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|WD=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}{{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}{{ill|lt=Honmachi (Ōji)|Q11520694|WD=Q11520694|lt=Honmachi|1=Honmachi}} 2-6-1 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 35 | 緯度秒 = 22.6 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 42 | 経度秒 = 17.7 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu Kōtaishin|1=Amaterasu}}
{{ill|lt=Sumiyoshi Three Deities|Q1114013|WD=Q1114013|lt=Uwatsutsu-no-O-no-Mikoto, Nakatsutsu-no-O-no-Mikoto, Sokotsutsu-no-O-no-Mikoto|1=Sumiyoshi sanjin}}
{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Hondawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}
Kiyotaki-no-Mikoto |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin-taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=myōjin major shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建= Unknown |本殿= {{ill|lt=Shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=July 31|Q2715|WD=Q2715|1=July 31}} (summer festival)
{{ill|lt=October 25|Q2954|WD=Q2954|1=October 25}} (autumn festival) |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Kataoka Shrine''' (かたおかじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Honmachi 2-chōme, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|WD=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and its former rank was {{ill|lt=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines#Shosha|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=gōsha|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. === History === === Outline === It is said that in ancient times it stood at the locale of Ōmine in Honmachi, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}. In {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} 1 ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|WD=Q30021|1=806}}), it was allotted {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}} of 7 households in Yamato, 8 in Tōtōmi, and 25 in Ōmi ({{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}), and in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, a noted shrine included in rain-prayer rites. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}}), in April, it was ranked as {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade, Merit Rank 8 to Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade, Merit Rank 8 (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') === Access === * 15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Ōji Station|Q856582|WD=Q856582|1=Ōji Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Yamatoji Line|Q1151659|WD=Q1151659|1=Yamatoji Line}} and {{ill|lt=Wakayama Line|Q511543|WD=Q511543|1=Wakayama Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR West|Q502125|WD=Q502125|1=West Japan Railway Company}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - Ōji Town Cultural Properties Map * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - Real Scenery of Nara in 2010 (Nara Prefectural Library and Information Center) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - Kashima Shrine (Kashiba) {{DEFAULTSORT:かたおかしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:王寺町の建築物]] [[Category:王寺町の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|名かたおかしんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧郷社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Hondawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}
Kiyotaki-no-Mikoto |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin-taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=myōjin major shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建= Unknown |本殿= {{ill|lt=Shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=July 31|Q2715|WD=Q2715|1=July 31}} (summer festival)
{{ill|lt=October 25|Q2954|WD=Q2954|1=October 25}} (autumn festival) |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Kataoka Shrine''' (かたおかじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Honmachi 2-chōme, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|WD=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and its former rank was {{ill|lt=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines#Shosha|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=gōsha|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. === History === === Outline === It is said that in ancient times it stood at the locale of Ōmine in Honmachi, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}. In {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} 1 ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|WD=Q30021|1=806}}), it was allotted {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}} of 7 households in Yamato, 8 in Tōtōmi, and 25 in Ōmi ({{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}), and in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, a noted shrine included in rain-prayer rites. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}}), in April, it was ranked as {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade, Merit Rank 8 to Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade, Merit Rank 8 (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') === Access === * 15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Ōji Station|Q856582|WD=Q856582|1=Ōji Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Yamatoji Line|Q1151659|WD=Q1151659|1=Yamatoji Line}} and {{ill|lt=Wakayama Line|Q511543|WD=Q511543|1=Wakayama Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR West|Q502125|WD=Q502125|1=West Japan Railway Company}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - Ōji Town Cultural Properties Map * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - Real Scenery of Nara in 2010 (Nara Prefectural Library and Information Center) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - Kashima Shrine (Kashiba) {{DEFAULTSORT:かたおかしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:王寺町の建築物]] [[Category:王寺町の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|名かたおかしんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧郷社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

Kiyotaki-no-Mikoto |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin-taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=myōjin major shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建= Unknown |本殿= {{ill|lt=Shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=July 31|Q2715|WD=Q2715|1=July 31}} (summer festival)
{{ill|lt=October 25|Q2954|WD=Q2954|1=October 25}} (autumn festival) |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Kataoka Shrine''' (かたおかじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Honmachi 2-chōme, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|WD=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and its former rank was {{ill|lt=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines#Shosha|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=gōsha|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. === History === === Outline === It is said that in ancient times it stood at the locale of Ōmine in Honmachi, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}. In {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} 1 ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|WD=Q30021|1=806}}), it was allotted {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}} of 7 households in Yamato, 8 in Tōtōmi, and 25 in Ōmi ({{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}), and in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, a noted shrine included in rain-prayer rites. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}}), in April, it was ranked as {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade, Merit Rank 8 to Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade, Merit Rank 8 (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') === Access === * 15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Ōji Station|Q856582|WD=Q856582|1=Ōji Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Yamatoji Line|Q1151659|WD=Q1151659|1=Yamatoji Line}} and {{ill|lt=Wakayama Line|Q511543|WD=Q511543|1=Wakayama Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR West|Q502125|WD=Q502125|1=West Japan Railway Company}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - Ōji Town Cultural Properties Map * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - Real Scenery of Nara in 2010 (Nara Prefectural Library and Information Center) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - Kashima Shrine (Kashiba) {{DEFAULTSORT:かたおかしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:王寺町の建築物]] [[Category:王寺町の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|名かたおかしんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧郷社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Hondawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}
Kiyotaki-no-Mikoto |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin-taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=myōjin major shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建= Unknown |本殿= {{ill|lt=Shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=July 31|Q2715|WD=Q2715|1=July 31}} (summer festival)
{{ill|lt=October 25|Q2954|WD=Q2954|1=October 25}} (autumn festival) |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Kataoka Shrine''' (かたおかじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Honmachi 2-chōme, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|WD=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and its former rank was {{ill|lt=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines#Shosha|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=gōsha|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. === History === === Outline === It is said that in ancient times it stood at the locale of Ōmine in Honmachi, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}. In {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} 1 ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|WD=Q30021|1=806}}), it was allotted {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}} of 7 households in Yamato, 8 in Tōtōmi, and 25 in Ōmi ({{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}), and in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, a noted shrine included in rain-prayer rites. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}}), in April, it was ranked as {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade, Merit Rank 8 to Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade, Merit Rank 8 (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') === Access === * 15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Ōji Station|Q856582|WD=Q856582|1=Ōji Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Yamatoji Line|Q1151659|WD=Q1151659|1=Yamatoji Line}} and {{ill|lt=Wakayama Line|Q511543|WD=Q511543|1=Wakayama Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR West|Q502125|WD=Q502125|1=West Japan Railway Company}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - Ōji Town Cultural Properties Map * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - Real Scenery of Nara in 2010 (Nara Prefectural Library and Information Center) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - Kashima Shrine (Kashiba) == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:王寺町の建築物]] [[Category:王寺町の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|名かたおかしんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧郷社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

Kiyotaki-no-Mikoto |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin-taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=myōjin major shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建= Unknown |本殿= {{ill|lt=Shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=July 31|Q2715|WD=Q2715|1=July 31}} (summer festival)
{{ill|lt=October 25|Q2954|WD=Q2954|1=October 25}} (autumn festival) |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Kataoka Shrine''' (かたおかじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Honmachi 2-chōme, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|WD=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and its former rank was {{ill|lt=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines#Shosha|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=gōsha|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. === History === === Outline === It is said that in ancient times it stood at the locale of Ōmine in Honmachi, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}. In {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} 1 ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|WD=Q30021|1=806}}), it was allotted {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}} of 7 households in Yamato, 8 in Tōtōmi, and 25 in Ōmi ({{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}), and in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, a noted shrine included in rain-prayer rites. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}}), in April, it was ranked as {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade, Merit Rank 8 to Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade, Merit Rank 8 (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') === Access === * 15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Ōji Station|Q856582|WD=Q856582|1=Ōji Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Yamatoji Line|Q1151659|WD=Q1151659|1=Yamatoji Line}} and {{ill|lt=Wakayama Line|Q511543|WD=Q511543|1=Wakayama Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR West|Q502125|WD=Q502125|1=West Japan Railway Company}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - Ōji Town Cultural Properties Map * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - Real Scenery of Nara in 2010 (Nara Prefectural Library and Information Center) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Hondawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}
Kiyotaki-no-Mikoto |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin-taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=myōjin major shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建= Unknown |本殿= {{ill|lt=Shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=July 31|Q2715|WD=Q2715|1=July 31}} (summer festival)
{{ill|lt=October 25|Q2954|WD=Q2954|1=October 25}} (autumn festival) |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Kataoka Shrine''' (かたおかじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Honmachi 2-chōme, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|WD=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and its former rank was {{ill|lt=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines#Shosha|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=gōsha|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. === History === === Outline === It is said that in ancient times it stood at the locale of Ōmine in Honmachi, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}. In {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} 1 ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|WD=Q30021|1=806}}), it was allotted {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}} of 7 households in Yamato, 8 in Tōtōmi, and 25 in Ōmi ({{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}), and in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, a noted shrine included in rain-prayer rites. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}}), in April, it was ranked as {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade, Merit Rank 8 to Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade, Merit Rank 8 (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') === Access === * 15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Ōji Station|Q856582|WD=Q856582|1=Ōji Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Yamatoji Line|Q1151659|WD=Q1151659|1=Yamatoji Line}} and {{ill|lt=Wakayama Line|Q511543|WD=Q511543|1=Wakayama Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR West|Q502125|WD=Q502125|1=West Japan Railway Company}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - Ōji Town Cultural Properties Map * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - Real Scenery of Nara in 2010 (Nara Prefectural Library and Information Center) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - Kashima Shrine (Kashiba) == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:王寺町の建築物]] [[Category:王寺町の歴史]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧郷社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

Kiyotaki-no-Mikoto |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin-taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=myōjin major shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建= Unknown |本殿= {{ill|lt=Shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=July 31|Q2715|WD=Q2715|1=July 31}} (summer festival)
{{ill|lt=October 25|Q2954|WD=Q2954|1=October 25}} (autumn festival) |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Kataoka Shrine''' (かたおかじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Honmachi 2-chōme, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|WD=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and its former rank was {{ill|lt=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines#Shosha|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=gōsha|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. === History === === Outline === It is said that in ancient times it stood at the locale of Ōmine in Honmachi, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}. In {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} 1 ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|WD=Q30021|1=806}}), it was allotted {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}} of 7 households in Yamato, 8 in Tōtōmi, and 25 in Ōmi ({{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}), and in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, a noted shrine included in rain-prayer rites. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}}), in April, it was ranked as {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade, Merit Rank 8 to Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade, Merit Rank 8 (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') === Access === * 15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Ōji Station|Q856582|WD=Q856582|1=Ōji Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Yamatoji Line|Q1151659|WD=Q1151659|1=Yamatoji Line}} and {{ill|lt=Wakayama Line|Q511543|WD=Q511543|1=Wakayama Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR West|Q502125|WD=Q502125|1=West Japan Railway Company}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - Ōji Town Cultural Properties Map * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - Real Scenery of Nara in 2010 (Nara Prefectural Library and Information Center) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Hondawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}
Kiyotaki-no-Mikoto |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin-taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=myōjin major shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建= Unknown |本殿= {{ill|lt=Shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=July 31|Q2715|WD=Q2715|1=July 31}} (summer festival)
{{ill|lt=October 25|Q2954|WD=Q2954|1=October 25}} (autumn festival) |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Kataoka Shrine''' (かたおかじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Honmachi 2-chōme, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|WD=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and its former rank was {{ill|lt=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines#Shosha|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=gōsha|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. === History === === Outline === It is said that in ancient times it stood at the locale of Ōmine in Honmachi, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}. In {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} 1 ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|WD=Q30021|1=806}}), it was allotted {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}} of 7 households in Yamato, 8 in Tōtōmi, and 25 in Ōmi ({{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}), and in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, a noted shrine included in rain-prayer rites. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}}), in April, it was ranked as {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade, Merit Rank 8 to Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade, Merit Rank 8 (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') === Access === * 15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Ōji Station|Q856582|WD=Q856582|1=Ōji Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Yamatoji Line|Q1151659|WD=Q1151659|1=Yamatoji Line}} and {{ill|lt=Wakayama Line|Q511543|WD=Q511543|1=Wakayama Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR West|Q502125|WD=Q502125|1=West Japan Railway Company}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - Ōji Town Cultural Properties Map * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - Real Scenery of Nara in 2010 (Nara Prefectural Library and Information Center) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建= Unknown |本殿= {{ill|lt=Shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=July 31|Q2715|WD=Q2715|1=July 31}} (summer festival)
{{ill|lt=October 25|Q2954|WD=Q2954|1=October 25}} (autumn festival) |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Kataoka Shrine''' (かたおかじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Honmachi 2-chōme, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|WD=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and its former rank was {{ill|lt=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines#Shosha|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=gōsha|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. === History === === Outline === It is said that in ancient times it stood at the locale of Ōmine in Honmachi, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}. In {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} 1 ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|WD=Q30021|1=806}}), it was allotted {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}} of 7 households in Yamato, 8 in Tōtōmi, and 25 in Ōmi ({{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}), and in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, a noted shrine included in rain-prayer rites. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}}), in April, it was ranked as {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade, Merit Rank 8 to Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade, Merit Rank 8 (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') === Access === * 15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Ōji Station|Q856582|WD=Q856582|1=Ōji Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Yamatoji Line|Q1151659|WD=Q1151659|1=Yamatoji Line}} and {{ill|lt=Wakayama Line|Q511543|WD=Q511543|1=Wakayama Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR West|Q502125|WD=Q502125|1=West Japan Railway Company}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建= Unknown |本殿= {{ill|lt=Shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=July 31|Q2715|WD=Q2715|1=July 31}} (summer festival)
{{ill|lt=October 25|Q2954|WD=Q2954|1=October 25}} (autumn festival) |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Kataoka Shrine''' (かたおかじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Honmachi 2-chōme, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|WD=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and its former rank was {{ill|lt=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines#Shosha|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=gōsha|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. === History === === Outline === It is said that in ancient times it stood at the locale of Ōmine in Honmachi, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}. In {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} 1 ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|WD=Q30021|1=806}}), it was allotted {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}} of 7 households in Yamato, 8 in Tōtōmi, and 25 in Ōmi ({{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}), and in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, a noted shrine included in rain-prayer rites. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}}), in April, it was ranked as {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade, Merit Rank 8 to Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade, Merit Rank 8 (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') === Access === * 15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Ōji Station|Q856582|WD=Q856582|1=Ōji Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Yamatoji Line|Q1151659|WD=Q1151659|1=Yamatoji Line}} and {{ill|lt=Wakayama Line|Q511543|WD=Q511543|1=Wakayama Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR West|Q502125|WD=Q502125|1=West Japan Railway Company}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - Ōji Town Cultural Properties Map * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - Real Scenery of Nara in 2010 (Nara Prefectural Library and Information Center) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建= Unknown |本殿= {{ill|lt=Shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=July 31|Q2715|WD=Q2715|1=July 31}} (summer festival)
{{ill|lt=October 25|Q2954|WD=Q2954|1=October 25}} (autumn festival) |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Kataoka Shrine''' (かたおかじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Honmachi 2-chōme, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|WD=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and its former rank was {{ill|lt=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines#Shosha|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=gōsha|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. === History === === Outline === It is said that in ancient times it stood at the locale of Ōmine in Honmachi, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}. In {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} 1 ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|WD=Q30021|1=806}}), it was allotted {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}} of 7 households in Yamato, 8 in Tōtōmi, and 25 in Ōmi ({{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}), and in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, a noted shrine included in rain-prayer rites. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}}), in April, it was ranked as {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade, Merit Rank 8 to Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade, Merit Rank 8 (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') === Access === * 15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Ōji Station|Q856582|WD=Q856582|1=Ōji Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Yamatoji Line|Q1151659|WD=Q1151659|1=Yamatoji Line}} and {{ill|lt=Wakayama Line|Q511543|WD=Q511543|1=Wakayama Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR West|Q502125|WD=Q502125|1=West Japan Railway Company}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建= Unknown |本殿= {{ill|lt=Shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=July 31|Q2715|WD=Q2715|1=July 31}} (summer festival)
{{ill|lt=October 25|Q2954|WD=Q2954|1=October 25}} (autumn festival) |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Kataoka Shrine''' (かたおかじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Honmachi 2-chōme, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|WD=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and its former rank was {{ill|lt=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines#Shosha|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=gōsha|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. === History === === Outline === It is said that in ancient times it stood at the locale of Ōmine in Honmachi, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}. In {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} 1 ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|WD=Q30021|1=806}}), it was allotted {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}} of 7 households in Yamato, 8 in Tōtōmi, and 25 in Ōmi ({{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}), and in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, a noted shrine included in rain-prayer rites. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}}), in April, it was ranked as {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade, Merit Rank 8 to Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade, Merit Rank 8 (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') === Access === * 15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Ōji Station|Q856582|WD=Q856582|1=Ōji Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Yamatoji Line|Q1151659|WD=Q1151659|1=Yamatoji Line}} and {{ill|lt=Wakayama Line|Q511543|WD=Q511543|1=Wakayama Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR West|Q502125|WD=Q502125|1=West Japan Railway Company}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - Ōji Town Cultural Properties Map * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - Real Scenery of Nara in 2010 (Nara Prefectural Library and Information Center) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - Kiyotaki-no-Mikoto |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin-taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=myōjin major shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建= Unknown |本殿= {{ill|lt=Shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=July 31|Q2715|WD=Q2715|1=July 31}} (summer festival)
{{ill|lt=October 25|Q2954|WD=Q2954|1=October 25}} (autumn festival) |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Kataoka Shrine''' (かたおかじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Honmachi 2-chōme, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|WD=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and its former rank was {{ill|lt=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines#Shosha|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=gōsha|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. === History === === Outline === It is said that in ancient times it stood at the locale of Ōmine in Honmachi, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}. In {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} 1 ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|WD=Q30021|1=806}}), it was allotted {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}} of 7 households in Yamato, 8 in Tōtōmi, and 25 in Ōmi ({{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}), and in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, a noted shrine included in rain-prayer rites. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}}), in April, it was ranked as {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade, Merit Rank 8 to Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade, Merit Rank 8 (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') === Access === * 15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Ōji Station|Q856582|WD=Q856582|1=Ōji Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Yamatoji Line|Q1151659|WD=Q1151659|1=Yamatoji Line}} and {{ill|lt=Wakayama Line|Q511543|WD=Q511543|1=Wakayama Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR West|Q502125|WD=Q502125|1=West Japan Railway Company}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - Ōji Town Cultural Properties Map * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - Real Scenery of Nara in 2010 (Nara Prefectural Library and Information Center) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - Kiyotaki-no-Mikoto |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin-taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=myōjin major shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建= Unknown |本殿= {{ill|lt=Shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=July 31|Q2715|WD=Q2715|1=July 31}} (summer festival)
{{ill|lt=October 25|Q2954|WD=Q2954|1=October 25}} (autumn festival) |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Kataoka Shrine''' (かたおかじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Honmachi 2-chōme, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|WD=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and its former rank was {{ill|lt=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines#Shosha|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=gōsha|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. === History === === Outline === It is said that in ancient times it stood at the locale of Ōmine in Honmachi, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}. In {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} 1 ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|WD=Q30021|1=806}}), it was allotted {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}} of 7 households in Yamato, 8 in Tōtōmi, and 25 in Ōmi ({{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}), and in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, a noted shrine included in rain-prayer rites. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}}), in April, it was ranked as {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade, Merit Rank 8 to Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade, Merit Rank 8 (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') === Access === * 15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Ōji Station|Q856582|WD=Q856582|1=Ōji Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Yamatoji Line|Q1151659|WD=Q1151659|1=Yamatoji Line}} and {{ill|lt=Wakayama Line|Q511543|WD=Q511543|1=Wakayama Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR West|Q502125|WD=Q502125|1=West Japan Railway Company}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - Ōji Town Cultural Properties Map * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - Real Scenery of Nara in 2010 (Nara Prefectural Library and Information Center) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - Kashima Shrine (Kashiba) == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:王寺町の建築物]] [[Category:王寺町の歴史]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]] [[Category:moved from a redlink]]

Kiyotaki-no-Mikoto |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin-taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=myōjin major shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建= Unknown |本殿= {{ill|lt=Shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=July 31|Q2715|WD=Q2715|1=July 31}} (summer festival)
{{ill|lt=October 25|Q2954|WD=Q2954|1=October 25}} (autumn festival) |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Kataoka Shrine''' (かたおかじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Honmachi 2-chōme, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|WD=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and its former rank was {{ill|lt=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines#Shosha|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=gōsha|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. === History === === Outline === It is said that in ancient times it stood at the locale of Ōmine in Honmachi, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}. In {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} 1 ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|WD=Q30021|1=806}}), it was allotted {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}} of 7 households in Yamato, 8 in Tōtōmi, and 25 in Ōmi ({{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}), and in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, a noted shrine included in rain-prayer rites. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}}), in April, it was ranked as {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade, Merit Rank 8 to Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade, Merit Rank 8 (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') === Access === * 15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Ōji Station|Q856582|WD=Q856582|1=Ōji Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Yamatoji Line|Q1151659|WD=Q1151659|1=Yamatoji Line}} and {{ill|lt=Wakayama Line|Q511543|WD=Q511543|1=Wakayama Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR West|Q502125|WD=Q502125|1=West Japan Railway Company}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - Ōji Town Cultural Properties Map * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - Real Scenery of Nara in 2010 (Nara Prefectural Library and Information Center) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Hondawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}
Kiyotaki-no-Mikoto |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin-taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=myōjin major shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建= Unknown |本殿= {{ill|lt=Shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=July 31|Q2715|WD=Q2715|1=July 31}} (summer festival)
{{ill|lt=October 25|Q2954|WD=Q2954|1=October 25}} (autumn festival) |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Kataoka Shrine''' (かたおかじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Honmachi 2-chōme, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|WD=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and its former rank was {{ill|lt=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines#Shosha|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=gōsha|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. === History === === Outline === It is said that in ancient times it stood at the locale of Ōmine in Honmachi, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}. In {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} 1 ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|WD=Q30021|1=806}}), it was allotted {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}} of 7 households in Yamato, 8 in Tōtōmi, and 25 in Ōmi ({{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}), and in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, a noted shrine included in rain-prayer rites. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}}), in April, it was ranked as {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade, Merit Rank 8 to Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade, Merit Rank 8 (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') === Access === * 15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Ōji Station|Q856582|WD=Q856582|1=Ōji Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Yamatoji Line|Q1151659|WD=Q1151659|1=Yamatoji Line}} and {{ill|lt=Wakayama Line|Q511543|WD=Q511543|1=Wakayama Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR West|Q502125|WD=Q502125|1=West Japan Railway Company}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - Ōji Town Cultural Properties Map * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - Real Scenery of Nara in 2010 (Nara Prefectural Library and Information Center) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - Kiyotaki-no-Mikoto |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin-taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=myōjin major shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建= Unknown |本殿= {{ill|lt=Shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=July 31|Q2715|WD=Q2715|1=July 31}} (summer festival)
{{ill|lt=October 25|Q2954|WD=Q2954|1=October 25}} (autumn festival) |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Kataoka Shrine''' (かたおかじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Honmachi 2-chōme, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|WD=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and its former rank was {{ill|lt=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines#Shosha|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=gōsha|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. === History === === Outline === It is said that in ancient times it stood at the locale of Ōmine in Honmachi, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}. In {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} 1 ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|WD=Q30021|1=806}}), it was allotted {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}} of 7 households in Yamato, 8 in Tōtōmi, and 25 in Ōmi ({{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}), and in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, a noted shrine included in rain-prayer rites. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}}), in April, it was ranked as {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade, Merit Rank 8 to Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade, Merit Rank 8 (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') === Access === * 15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Ōji Station|Q856582|WD=Q856582|1=Ōji Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Yamatoji Line|Q1151659|WD=Q1151659|1=Yamatoji Line}} and {{ill|lt=Wakayama Line|Q511543|WD=Q511543|1=Wakayama Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR West|Q502125|WD=Q502125|1=West Japan Railway Company}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - Ōji Town Cultural Properties Map * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - Real Scenery of Nara in 2010 (Nara Prefectural Library and Information Center) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - Kashima Shrine (Kashiba) == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:王寺町の建築物]] [[Category:王寺町の歴史]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Qq old]]

Kiyotaki-no-Mikoto |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin-taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=myōjin major shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建= Unknown |本殿= {{ill|lt=Shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=July 31|Q2715|WD=Q2715|1=July 31}} (summer festival)
{{ill|lt=October 25|Q2954|WD=Q2954|1=October 25}} (autumn festival) |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Kataoka Shrine''' (かたおかじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Honmachi 2-chōme, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|WD=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and its former rank was {{ill|lt=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines#Shosha|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=gōsha|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. === History === === Outline === It is said that in ancient times it stood at the locale of Ōmine in Honmachi, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}. In {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} 1 ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|WD=Q30021|1=806}}), it was allotted {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}} of 7 households in Yamato, 8 in Tōtōmi, and 25 in Ōmi ({{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}), and in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, a noted shrine included in rain-prayer rites. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}}), in April, it was ranked as {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade, Merit Rank 8 to Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade, Merit Rank 8 (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') === Access === * 15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Ōji Station|Q856582|WD=Q856582|1=Ōji Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Yamatoji Line|Q1151659|WD=Q1151659|1=Yamatoji Line}} and {{ill|lt=Wakayama Line|Q511543|WD=Q511543|1=Wakayama Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR West|Q502125|WD=Q502125|1=West Japan Railway Company}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - Ōji Town Cultural Properties Map * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - Real Scenery of Nara in 2010 (Nara Prefectural Library and Information Center) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - Kashima Shrine (Kashiba) == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:王寺町の建築物]] [[Category:王寺町の歴史]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Qq old]]
