Kiyotaki-no-Mikoto |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin-taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=myōjin major shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建= Unknown |本殿= {{ill|lt=Shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=July 31|Q2715|WD=Q2715|1=July 31}} (summer festival)
{{ill|lt=October 25|Q2954|WD=Q2954|1=October 25}} (autumn festival) |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Kataoka Shrine''' (かたおかじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Honmachi 2-chōme, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|WD=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and its former rank was {{ill|lt=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines#Shosha|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=gōsha|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. === History === === Outline === It is said that in ancient times it stood at the locale of Ōmine in Honmachi, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|WD=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}. In {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} 1 ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|WD=Q30021|1=806}}), it was allotted {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}} of 7 households in Yamato, 8 in Tōtōmi, and 25 in Ōmi ({{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}), and in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, a noted shrine included in rain-prayer rites. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}}), in April, it was ranked as {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade, Merit Rank 8 to Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade, Merit Rank 8 (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') === Access === * 15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Ōji Station|Q856582|WD=Q856582|1=Ōji Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Yamatoji Line|Q1151659|WD=Q1151659|1=Yamatoji Line}} and {{ill|lt=Wakayama Line|Q511543|WD=Q511543|1=Wakayama Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR West|Q502125|WD=Q502125|1=West Japan Railway Company}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - Ōji Town Cultural Properties Map * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - Real Scenery of Nara in 2010 (Nara Prefectural Library and Information Center) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - Kashima Shrine (Kashiba) == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:王寺町の建築物]] [[Category:王寺町の歴史]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Nara Prefecture]]

{{ill|lt=October 25|Q2954|qid=Q2954|1=October 25}} (autumn festival) |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Kataoka Shrine''' (かたおかじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Honmachi 2-chōme, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|qid=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|qid=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|qid=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and its former rank was {{ill|lt=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines#Shosha|Q712534|qid=Q712534|lt=gōsha|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. === History === === Outline === It is said that in ancient times it stood at the locale of Ōmine in Honmachi, {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|qid=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}. In {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|qid=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} 1 ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|qid=Q30021|1=806}}), it was allotted {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|qid=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}} of 7 households in Yamato, 8 in Tōtōmi, and 25 in Ōmi ({{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|qid=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}), and in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|qid=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, a noted shrine included in rain-prayer rites. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|qid=Q7757|1=1873}}), in April, it was ranked as {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|qid=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|qid=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|qid=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade, Merit Rank 8 to Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade, Merit Rank 8 (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|qid=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') === Access === * 15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Ōji Station|Q856582|qid=Q856582|1=Ōji Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Yamatoji Line|Q1151659|qid=Q1151659|1=Yamatoji Line}} and {{ill|lt=Wakayama Line|Q511543|qid=Q511543|1=Wakayama Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR West|Q502125|qid=Q502125|1=West Japan Railway Company}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Kataoka-jinja (Oji)}} * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/745.html 片岡神社] - Ōji Town Cultural Properties Map * [https://www.library.pref.nara.jp/nara_2010/0196.html 片岡神社] - Real Scenery of Nara in 2010 (Nara Prefectural Library and Information Center) * {{Wayback|url=http://kasimajinjya.web.fc2.com/kataoka.html |title=片岡神社の案内 |date=20171201040812}} - Kashima Shrine (Kashiba) == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kataoka Shrine (Oji Town)]][[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:王寺町の建築物]] [[Category:王寺町の歴史]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Nara Prefecture]]
